name: OIDC Authentication
description:
This plugin allows users to sign in through an OIDC provider (such as Google, Facebook, or your own provider). This enables one-click signin.
Review documentation at https://github.com/eddymoulton/jellyfin-plugin-oidc
overview: Authenticate users against an OIDC provider.
